attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 						
  SDNBTN.DRVD_NCR_BKG_TRX_KEY                                 BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
  RFDTY.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT                           BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,
  CAST(((100.000000 - WDNDT.BOOKINGS_PERCENTAGE)/100.000000) *(WDNDT.SPLIT_PERCENTAGE/100.000000)* WDNDT.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY  AS DECIMAL(18,6))    DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY, 
  CAST(WDNDT.CONVERSION_DT                AS DATE)   CONVERSION_DT, 
  WDNDT.SALES_REP_NUMBER                                     SALES_REP_NUMBER,
  WDNDT.TRANSACTION_DATETIME                                 TRANSACTION_DATETIME,
  WDNDT.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT                          TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT,
  WDNDT.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE                                   SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
  WDNDT.CDB_DATA_SOURCE_CODE                                 CDB_DATA_SOURCE_CODE,
  WDNDT.SPLIT_PERCENTAGE                                     SPLIT_PERCENTAGE,
  RFDTY.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT                            BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
  WDNDT.DD_SERVICE_FLAG                                      DD_SERVICE_FLAG,
 CASE WHEN DD_ITEM_TYPE_CODE_FLAG= 'Y'
 OR DD_RMA_FLAG = 'Y'
 OR DD_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLAG = 'Y'
 OR DD_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLAG = 'Y'
 OR DD_REVENUE_FLAG = 'N'
 OR DD_OVERLAY_FLAG='Y'
 OR DD_SALESREP_FLAG ='Y'
 OR DD_IC_REVENUE_FLAG='N'
 OR DD_CHARGES_FLAG='Y'
 OR DD_MISC_FLAG='Y'
 OR DD_ACQUISITION_FLAG='Y' 
 OR NP.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD <> 'UNKNOWN'
 OR (NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' AND NPF.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID = 'CDBU' AND ELC.ENABLE_FLAG = 'Y') 
 THEN 'N'
 ELSE CASE WHEN RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE <> 'WW Distribution' THEN 'Y' 
   ELSE 'N' END 
 END DD_CORP_BKG_FLAG, 
  CAST (
                  CAST(
                                  CAST(((WDNDT.SPLIT_PERCENTAGE * 
                                                   WDNDT.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY *
                                                                  WDNDT.NET_PRICE_AMOUNT)/100.000000) 
                                                  AS DECIMAL(18,6)) *
                                                  (WDNDT.BOOKINGS_PERCENTAGE/100.000000) 
                                  AS DECIMAL(18,6))* 
                                                                                  COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),CAST(1 AS DECIMAL(18,11))              ) 
                  AS DECIMAL(18,6) 
    )                  DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT, 
   CAST (
                  CAST(
                                  CAST(((WDNDT.SPLIT_PERCENTAGE * 
                                                   WDNDT.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY *
                                                                  WDNDT.NET_PRICE_AMOUNT)/100.000000) 
                                                  AS DECIMAL(18,6)) *
                                                  ((100.000000 - WDNDT.BOOKINGS_PERCENTAGE)/100.000000) 
                                  AS DECIMAL(18,6))* 
                                                                                  COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),CAST(1 AS DECIMAL(18,11))              ) 
                  AS DECIMAL(18,6) 
    )               DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT, 
  WDNDT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY                                 SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  WDNDT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY                                 BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  WDNDT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY                                 SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  COALESCE(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE,1) AS         CONVERSION_RT,
  WDNDT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY                                 SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  WDNDT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT                                     BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
  WDNDT.PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER                                PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER,
  WDNDT.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME                               BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME,
  WDNDT.FORWARD_REVERSE_CODE                                 FORWARD_REVERSE_CODE,
  WDNDT.BOOKINGS_PERCENTAGE                                  BOOKINGS_PERCENTAGE,
  WDNDT.NET_PRICE_AMOUNT                                     NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,
  WDNDT.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY                                 TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,
  WDNDT.EP_PROCESS_DT                 PROCESS_DATE, /*Populating from EP_PROCESS_DT*/
  WDNDT.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE                                 BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE,
  WDNDT.SALES_ORDER_KEY                                      SALES_ORDER_KEY,
  WDNDT.DD_ITEM_TYPE_CODE_FLAG                               DD_ITEM_TYPE_CODE_FLAG,
  WDNDT.DD_RMA_FLAG                                          DD_RMA_FLAG,
  WDNDT.DD_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLAG                           DD_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLAG,
  WDNDT.DD_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLAG                             DD_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLAG,
  WDNDT.DD_REVENUE_FLAG                                      DD_REVENUE_FLAG,
  WDNDT.DD_OVERLAY_FLAG                                      DD_OVERLAY_FLAG,
  WDNDT.DD_SALESREP_FLAG                                     DD_SALESREP_FLAG,
  WDNDT.DD_IC_REVENUE_FLAG                                   DD_IC_REVENUE_FLAG,
  WDNDT.DD_CHARGES_FLAG                                      DD_CHARGES_FLAG,
  WDNDT.DD_MISC_FLAG                                         DD_MISC_FLAG,
  WDNDT.DD_ACQUISITION_FLAG                                  DD_ACQUISITION_FLAG,
  'N'                                                        CORP_BKG_RECOMPUTE_FLAG,
  CASE
   WHEN   WDNDT.UNIT_LIST_PRICE=0.000000 THEN 0.000000
      ELSE  CAST (CAST(  COALESCE(WDNDT_LIST_OUT.LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,0.000000) * (WDNDT.SPLIT_PERCENTAGE/100.000000)  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )                                                                                * 
                          CAST( WDNDT.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY  * (WDNDT.BOOKINGS_PERCENTAGE/100.000000)  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )
                  AS DECIMAL(18,6) 
      )
  END                                                        DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT, 
  CASE
   WHEN   SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME LIKE 'Invoice Only%' AND COALESCE(CUSTOMER_PO_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN') <> 'Demo/Eval' THEN 0
   ELSE
     CAST(
                   CAST(COALESCE( WDNDT_COST_OUT.STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT,0.000000) *  (WDNDT.SPLIT_PERCENTAGE/100.000000) AS DECIMAL(18,6) ) * 
        CAST( WDNDT.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY * (WDNDT.BOOKINGS_PERCENTAGE/100.000000) AS DECIMAL(18,6) ) AS DECIMAL(18,6)         
      )
  END                                 DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT,
  CAST( (WDNDT.BOOKINGS_PERCENTAGE/100.000000) *  (WDNDT.SPLIT_PERCENTAGE/100.000000)*
                                 WDNDT.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY         AS DECIMAL(18,6) 
   )                                               DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY, 
  CAST( 
                  CAST(COALESCE(WDNDT_LIST_OUT.LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,0.000000) * (WDNDT.SPLIT_PERCENTAGE/100.000000) AS DECIMAL(18,6) )* 
                  CAST( WDNDT.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY * ((100.000000 - WDNDT.BOOKINGS_PERCENTAGE)/100.000000)  AS DECIMAL(18,6) ) AS DECIMAL(18,6) 
   )                    DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT, 
  CASE 
   WHEN   SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME LIKE 'Invoice Only%' AND COALESCE(PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN') <> 'Demo/Eval' THEN 0
   ELSE
   CAST(
     CAST(COALESCE(WDNDT_COST_OUT.STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT,0.000000) * (WDNDT.SPLIT_PERCENTAGE/100.000000) AS DECIMAL(18,6) ) * 
      CAST(    WDNDT.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY *((100.000000 - WDNDT.BOOKINGS_PERCENTAGE)/100.000000) AS DECIMAL(18,6))                AS DECIMAL(18,6)
    )
  END                                 DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT,
  WDNDT.ES_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT                                   ES_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
  WDNDT.ORDER_DTM AS                                     ORDER_DTM,
  WDNDT.CANCELLED_FLG                                        CANCELLED_FLG,
  WDNDT.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME                             RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME,
  WDNDT.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE                            SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE,
  WDNDT.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE                                   SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE,
  CAST(
   CAST(
     CAST(
                   ((WDNDT.SPLIT_PERCENTAGE *  WDNDT.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY * WDNDT.UNIT_LIST_PRICE)/100.000000) 
       AS DECIMAL(18,6)
      ) * (WDNDT.BOOKINGS_PERCENTAGE/100.000000)
      AS DECIMAL(18,6)
    ) * COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),CAST( 1 AS DECIMAL(18,11))) 
                  AS DECIMAL(18,6)
   )                 DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT, 
  RFDTY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT                                DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
  WDNDT.SALES_ORDER_OPERATING_UNIT                           SALES_ORDER_OPERATING_UNIT,
  WDNDT.PRODUCT_KEY                                          PRODUCT_KEY,
  WDNDT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY                                  SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
  WDNDT.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE                               SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
  WDNDT.CANCEL_CODE,
  WDNDT.SO_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT                                  SO_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT,
  WDNDT.SOL_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT                                 SOL_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT,
  WDNDT.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT                                 SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT,
  WDNDT.SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_KEY           SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_KEY,
  WDNDT.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME                                  EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
  WDNDT.EDW_CREATE_USER                                      EDW_CREATE_USER,
  WDNDT.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME                                  EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
  WDNDT.EDW_UPDATE_USER                                      EDW_UPDATE_USER,
  CASE
  WHEN   
   DD_ITEM_TYPE_CODE_FLAG= 'Y'
   OR DD_RMA_FLAG = 'Y'
   OR DD_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLAG = 'Y'
   OR DD_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLAG = 'Y'
   OR DD_REVENUE_FLAG = 'N'
   OR DD_OVERLAY_FLAG='Y'
   OR DD_SALESREP_FLAG ='Y'
   OR DD_IC_REVENUE_FLAG='N'
   OR DD_CHARGES_FLAG='Y'
   OR DD_MISC_FLAG='Y'
   OR DD_ACQUISITION_FLAG='Y' 
   OR NP.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD <> 'UNKNOWN'
   OR (NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' 
 AND NPF.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID = 'CDBU' 
 AND ELC.ENABLE_FLAG = 'Y')
   THEN 'N' 
 ELSE 'Y' 
  END  DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,   
  CASE
  WHEN DD_ITEM_TYPE_CODE_FLAG= 'Y'
   OR DD_RMA_FLAG = 'Y'
   OR DD_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLAG = 'Y'
   OR DD_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLAG = 'Y'
   OR DD_REVENUE_FLAG = 'N'
   OR DD_OVERLAY_FLAG='Y'
   OR DD_SALESREP_FLAG ='Y'
   OR DD_IC_REVENUE_FLAG='N'
   OR DD_CHARGES_FLAG='Y'
   OR DD_MISC_FLAG='Y'
   OR DD_ACQUISITION_FLAG='Y' 
   OR NP.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD <> 'UNKNOWN'
   OR (NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' 
 AND NPF.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID = 'CDBU' 
 AND ELC.ENABLE_FLAG = 'Y') 
 THEN 'N' 
   ELSE
  CASE WHEN RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = 'WW Distribution' THEN 'Y'
  ELSE 'N'
  END 
  END DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG,
  WDNDT.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD                     ,             
  WDNDT.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT         ,
  WDNDT.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY              ,
  WDNDT.DV_PRODUCT_KEY ,
  WDNDT.BK_SO_LINE_CANCEL_REASON_CD,
  CAST(
    CAST(
      CAST(
                    ((WDNDT.SPLIT_PERCENTAGE *  WDNDT.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY * WDNDT.UNIT_LIST_PRICE)/100.000000) 
        AS DECIMAL(18,6)
       )  * (WDNDT.BOOKINGS_PERCENTAGE/100.000000)
       AS DECIMAL(18,6)
     ) /* COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),CAST( 1 AS DECIMAL(18,11))) */
                   AS DECIMAL(18,6)
    )                 DV_LOCAL_EXTND_LIST_PRICE_AMT , 
 CAST( 
 CAST(WDNDT.UNIT_LIST_PRICE AS DECIMAL(18,6)) 
 *
 CAST((SPLIT_PERCENTAGE/100.000000 )AS DECIMAL(18,6) )
 *
 CASE WHEN WDNDT.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET') THEN
   CAST( -1 AS DECIMAL(18,6) ) 
 ELSE 
   CAST(1 AS DECIMAL(18,6) )
 END
 AS DECIMAL(18,6))
 LOCAL_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_AMT1
 ,
  CAST(LOCAL_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_AMT1*COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),CAST(1 AS DECIMAL(18,
  11)) )AS DECIMAL(18,6))
 DV_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT 
  /* Added as part of PA scope XaaS Q1FY18 goponnus */
,CAST(
    CASE WHEN WDNDT.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','BIB','BIB OFFSET') THEN
     CAST ( CAST(COALESCE(ELPA.ADJSTD_USD_AMT,0.0000000) * CAST( WDNDT.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY *  (WDNDT.BOOKINGS_PERCENTAGE/100.000000)  AS DECIMAL(18,6) ) * (WDNDT.SPLIT_PERCENTAGE/100.000000) * (WDNDT.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100.000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7) ) AS DECIMAL(26,7) )
	 WHEN WDNDT.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET') THEN
     CAST ( CAST(COALESCE(ELPA.ADJSTD_USD_AMT,0.0000000) * CAST( WDNDT.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY * (WDNDT.BOOKINGS_PERCENTAGE/100.000000)  AS DECIMAL(18,6) ) *(WDNDT.SPLIT_PERCENTAGE/100.000000)  AS DECIMAL(26,7) ) * CAST(-1 AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS DECIMAL(26,7) )
      ELSE  CAST ( CAST(COALESCE(ELPA.ADJSTD_USD_AMT,0.0000000) * CAST( WDNDT.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY * (WDNDT.BOOKINGS_PERCENTAGE/100.000000)  AS DECIMAL(18,6) ) *(WDNDT.SPLIT_PERCENTAGE/100.000000)  AS DECIMAL(26,7) )  AS DECIMAL(26,7) )
  END *
COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),CAST(1 AS DECIMAL(18,11)) )AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS DV_PURCHASE_ADJ_DSCNT_USD_AMT
  /* END Q1FY18*/
  ,WDNDT.POB_TYPE_CD /* Added as part of NRS MPOB Changes */ 
  ,WDNDT.SALES_MOTION_CD /*Added as part of Sales OCT FY18 Rel Changes*/  
 
 ,
  CAST(CAST( 
 CAST(NSOL.ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_TRXL_AMT AS DECIMAL(18,6)) 
 * (CASE WHEN WDNDT.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','BIB','BIB OFFSET') THEN (WDNDT.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100.000000) ELSE 1 END)*

 CAST((SPLIT_PERCENTAGE/100.000000 )AS DECIMAL(18,6) ) * (WDNDT.BOOKINGS_PERCENTAGE/100.000000)
 *
 CASE WHEN WDNDT.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET') THEN
   CAST( -1 AS DECIMAL(18,6) ) 
 ELSE 
   CAST(1 AS DECIMAL(18,6) )
 END
 AS DECIMAL(18,6))
*COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),CAST(1 AS DECIMAL(18,11)) )AS DECIMAL(26,7))
 DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE 
  
  
  
  ,CAST(CASE
   WHEN   NSOL.ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_TRXL_AMT =0.000000 THEN 0.000000
      ELSE  CAST (CAST(  COALESCE(NSOL.ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_TRXL_AMT ,0.000000) * (WDNDT.SPLIT_PERCENTAGE/100.000000)  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )  *
	   CASE WHEN WDNDT.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','BIB','BIB OFFSET') THEN (WDNDT.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100.000000) ELSE 1 END
	   * 
                          CAST( WDNDT.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY  * (WDNDT.BOOKINGS_PERCENTAGE/100.000000)  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )
                  AS DECIMAL(18,6) 
      )
  END AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS                                                        DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
  
/*   ,CAST ( CASE
   WHEN   NSOL.ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_TRXL_AMT  =0.000000 THEN 0.000000
      ELSE  CAST (CAST(  COALESCE(NSOL.ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_TRXL_AMT  ,0.000000) * (WDNDT.SPLIT_PERCENTAGE/100.000000)  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )                                                                                * 
                          CAST( (WDNDT.BOOKINGS_PERCENTAGE/100.000000)  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )
                  AS DECIMAL(18,6) 
      )
  END      AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS                                                   DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE */
 ,WDNDT.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
 /*ADDED AS PART OF SFP Q4FY21 REL*/
,CAST(
                CAST(
                        CAST( ((WDNDT.SPLIT_PERCENTAGE * WDNDT.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY * WDNDT.UNIT_WHLSL_PRC_LST_LOC_AMT)/100.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7) ) *
                                                  (WDNDT.BOOKINGS_PERCENTAGE/100.0000000) 
                       AS DECIMAL(26,7)
                     ) * COALESCE( CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),CAST(1 AS DECIMAL(18,11)) ) 
        AS DECIMAL(26,7) 
      )  AS DV_COMP_US_GROSS_BKG_AMOUNT,
	  NSOL.BUYING_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME
  FROM  $$NRTSTGDB.WI_DRVD_NRT_DEBOOKINGS_TRX WDNDT  
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_DRVD_NCR_BKG_TRX_NRT SDNBTN
                 ON(SDNBTN.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT=WDNDT.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT)
   /* Added as part of PA scope XaaS Q1FY18 goponnus */
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OE_PRICE_ADJUSTMENTS_NRT ELPA
 ON WDNDT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=ELPA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
  AND ELPA.SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_DESCR='Purchase Adjustment'/* END Q1FY18 */
  
 LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL --added newly for Q4April20
 ON WDNDT.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR
                  ON  
      ( WDNDT.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE=NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE
       AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE='USD'
       AND NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE=WDNDT.CONVERSION_DT 
      ) 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR  RFDTY
      /*ON( CAST(WDNDT.TRANSACTION_DATETIME AS DATE) =RFDTY.BK_CALENDAR_DATE) */
      ON( WDNDT.EP_PROCESS_DT =RFDTY.BK_CALENDAR_DATE)
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$NRTSTGDB.WI_DRVD_NRT_DBKG_TRX_LST_PRICE   WDNDT_LIST_OUT  
                  ON (WDNDT_LIST_OUT.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = SDNBTN.DRVD_NCR_BKG_TRX_KEY )
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$NRTSTGDB.WI_DRVD_NRT_DBKG_TRX_COST    WDNDT_COST_OUT   
                  ON (WDNDT_COST_OUT.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY=SDNBTN.DRVD_NCR_BKG_TRX_KEY) 
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH
  ON WDNDT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY            
  
  LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
  ON NP.ITEM_KEY = WDNDT.PRODUCT_KEY
   
  LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_FAMILY NPF      /* NP, NPF and ELC Joins added as part of Q2FY16 - CDBU - SA (Scientific Atlanta) Changes for CORP BOOKINGS FLAG, REVENUE RECOGNITION FLAG and NET SPREAD FLAG Columns */
  ON NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID = NPF.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID
  
  LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDBU ELC
  ON NPF.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID = ELC.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID
  AND NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = ELC.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE
